emotion: Reliable, structured, precise, heavy-duty, modern engineering

background.description: Zinc-100 (Concrete) for main app background to reduce eye strain, pure White for cards/surfaces to maximize contrast.

text.description: Zinc-950 for stark readability. Zinc-600 for secondary data.

primary.description: Safety Orange for primary calls-to-action, active indicators, and high-priority metrics.

secondary.description: Blueprint Blue for secondary actions, info states, and chart accents.

borders.description: Hard Zinc-950 lines (2px preferred) for structural separation. No soft grey borders for main elements.

fonts.heading: Cabinet Grotesk
fonts.install_instructions: Import these fonts via Google Fonts or Fontsource. JetBrains Mono is strictly for numbers, KPIs, and data tables.

spacing_and_layout.grid: Control Room Grid. Strict grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Subgrid for inner layouts.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) for cards. Dense padding for tables.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align text and data. Center only when balancing a single large KPI.

borders_and_shadows.description: Brutalist / physical card styles. No soft drop shadows. Elements should feel like heavy concrete blocks or steel plates.

component_rules.buttons: Always rectangular (rounded-none). Primary buttons use Safety Orange with 2px black border. Secondary buttons use White background with 2px black border.
component_rules.cards: White background, border-2 border-zinc-950, solid black bottom-right drop shadow. Use strict straight lines.
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn inputs overridden with rounded-none, border-2 border-zinc-950, focus:ring-0 focus:border-orange-500.
component_rules.tables: Dense. Strict border-b-2 border-zinc-950 for headers. Monospace font for numerical data. Zebra striping with zinc-50.
component_rules.badges: Square (rounded-none). High contrast. e.g., bg-orange-500 text-white font-bold uppercase text-xs px-2 py-1.
component_rules.charts: Recharts. Use linear or step curves, NEVER smoothed/monotone. Strict geometric representation. Primary line: Safety Orange. Secondary line: Blueprint Blue.

navigation.style: Left sidebar (Command Center format). High contrast (Zinc-950 background, white text) OR stark white with heavy 2px right border. Include prominent user avatar and active project selector.

icons.style: Heavy, structural, un-styled lines to match brutalist borders.

motion.hover: Mechanical transitions. Fast and immediate (duration-150). Elements press in mechanically (translate-x-1 translate-y-1).
motion.loaders: Industrial loading states (e.g., repeating diagonal safety stripes moving).

media.strategy: Use high-contrast, desaturated photography for construction sites to match the brutalist aesthetic. Images should have a 2px black border.

image_urls.description: Gray metal building frame. Use as a subtle background pattern or login page visual.
Dynamic architectural contrast. Use for project/obra cards.
Modern building facade. Use for project/obra cards.
Engineer portrait. Use for user profile, assigned team, or contractor avatars.
Blueprint technical drawing. Use for reports, requisitions, or attachment thumbnails.

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements must include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='sidebar-nav-projects', data-testid='kpi-card-active-projects', data-testid='create-quote-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure React/Tailwind + Shadcn.

Override default Shadcn styles to strip out border-radius (rounded-none) and subtle shadows (shadow-sm). Apply heavy borders (border-2 border-zinc-950) and stark solid shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)]).
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headings. Use Chivo for body text. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for numerical data (KPI values, table numbers, financial amounts).
Use a stark, brutalist aesthetic. The UI should feel like a physical command center or a heavy-duty industrial tool.
Ensure all interactive elements have strong active/focus states with Safety Orange.
Apply `data-testid` to all major sections, buttons, and form elements.
Use standard Recharts but customize strokes to be angular (type='linear'), 2px wide, and using the brand palette (Safety Orange / Blueprint Blue).
The login page should feature the 'hero_or_background' image prominently on one side with a heavy industrial login form on the other.
